goal: Make install dead simple — brew tap + brew install and done
approach: Simplified README to just show brew tap/install. Added real SHA256 hashes to Homebrew formula from v0.1.0 release assets. Created exla-ai/homebrew-cuz tap repo with the formula so brew tap actually works.

alternatives.option: Keep detailed README with data model docs
alternatives.rejected_because: User wanted a simple 'just works' README, not a technical spec
